notes: Smoke mode validates package behavior without local datasets.
Full mode runs dataset-backed FP1 validation and test protocols for W-HPC and the frozen M1 MM-WHPC package.

The default MM-WHPC full protocol matches the manuscript freeze: uniform local weights, max aggregation, symmetric M search over {1,2,3,4,5}, inner validation on the official training split, and refit on the full official training split.
